ref_text_raw: It states that the most effective place for the main subject is at the intersection of lines dividing the image into thirds vertically and horizontally (see example).
ref_text_normalized: it states that the most effective place for the main subject is at the intersection of lines dividing the image into thirds vertically and horizontally see example
text: It states that the most effective place for the main subject is at the intersection of lines dividing the image into vertically and horizontally. See example.

params.note: model+language only; no context_bias (R-2.3); defaults otherwise (R-2.4)

raw_response.text: It states that the most effective place for the main subject is at the intersection of lines dividing the image into vertically and horizontally. See example.
